subcodes.title: Words to Indian pilgrims, spoken on 1914-05-28
subcodes.first_line: Today whosoever arises to promote the Word of God the powers of the world of existence will assist him from all directions. Teaching the Cause is the Magnet which attracts unto man Divine Confirmations
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love as fire, @Imam Husayn
